case_title: WILLIAM Y MOORES MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, DIVISION OF MEDICAL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MOORES MD, WILLIAM Y

LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, LINDA WHITNEY AND BARBARA YAROSLAVSKY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 20 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD EXHAUSTION OF ADMINISTRATIVE REMEDIES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA, LINDA WHITNEY AND BARBARA YAROSLAVSKY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 16, 2011 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES.
